---
title: "Beyond"
toc: false
---

<p class="personal-lede">
A short page about what I do when I am not doing physics.
</p>

I have practised piano for seven years, with a repertoire running toward Schumann, Brahms, Liszt and Chopin. I also take rhetoric seriously: I came second in a French national eloquence competition at the end of high school (2020), and since the start of M1 I have been part of the eloquence workshop run by Mission Culture at Université Lyon 1, with a festival programmed for spring 2026.

Alongside the technical work, I read in the history and philosophy of science, and I am slowly learning Italian, partly with Padova in mind. I have practised Brazilian jiu-jitsu for several years as a student, and I am a member of the [Société Française de Physique](https://www.sfpnet.fr/) (since 2023).
